name: vicegerent-hermes-lsp
description: All npm-installable LSP servers from Hermes' INSTALL_RECIPES (agent/lsp/install.py) — the full set Hermes auto-installs by default. Hermes launches each by binary name for semantic diagnostics; the egress-locked sandbox cannot npm-install at runtime, so they are baked here. gopls (Go) is built in a separate Dockerfile stage. The three manual-only servers (rust-analyzer, clangd, lua-language-server) are intentionally excluded — Hermes itself does not auto-install them. Add an npm-based server = add a line to dependencies; Renovate's native npm manager tracks them.
